info.name: LMS — Dashboard & Analytics (v1)
info.description:
Aggregated home-screen + analytics data for the student and teacher apps. Each endpoint composes the same data the per-feature endpoints expose (attendance, marks, exams, homework, announcements) into a single call, so the home screen needs one request.

Auth: Sanctum bearer token in `authToken`.

request.description:
Home + analytics payload for the logged-in STUDENT. Response `data` contains:
- `profile` (name, standard, section, roll_no, admission_no)
- `attendance` (current month: total/working/present/absent days, present_percentage, + a 7-day `week` strip)
- `performance` (overall_percentage, total_obtained/max, `subject_wise[]`, `trend[]` of recent exam %s)
- `exams.upcoming[]` (published, not-yet-ended)
- `homework` (total + `recent[]`)
- `notices[]` (latest announcements for students)

403/404 if the caller is not a student / has no student profile.

Home + analytics payload for the logged-in TEACHER. Response `data` contains:
- `profile` (name, employee_id)
- `today_classes[]` (subject, class, time, room — from the timetable)
- `totals` (total_students, total_classes_today, homework_count, upcoming_exams)
- `class_attendance` (overall_percentage + `by_class[]` with present/total/percentage for today)
- `homework.recent[]` (assigned by this teacher)
- `exams.upcoming[]`
- `notices[]` (latest announcements for teachers)

404 if the caller has no teacher profile.
